nasb.text: And when they had examined me, they were willing to release me because there was no ground for putting me to death.

esv.text: When they had examined me, they wished to set me at liberty, because there was no reason for the death penalty in my case.

cnv.text: 他們審訊之後，因為在我身上沒有甚麼該死的罪，就想要釋放我。

ccb.text: 罗马官员审讯了我，发现我没有什么该死的罪，想释放我，

csbs.text: 他们审问我以后，因为没有处死我的任何理由，本来想要释放我。
